Action: Business Issuer creates a deferred credential offer for a bound credential; Wallet collects the offer and retrieves the transaction ID
Data:
- Deferred credential offer deeplink
- Credential type: university_example_sd_jwt (bound)
- Credential management ID
- Transaction ID from offer collection
Expected Result: Wallet successfully retrieves transaction ID; credential management entry created in PENDING state

Action: Business Issuer transitions the credential management state to READY without providing additional credential data
Data:
- Credential management ID
- UpdateCredentialStatusRequestType.READY
- Issuer management API call
Expected Result: Credential management state successfully updated to READY; credential data remains as configured in credential type

Action: Wallet retrieves the bound SD-JWT credential using the transaction ID from the deferred flow
Expected Result: Wallet successfully retrieves bound SD-JWT credential with selective disclosure support

Action: Business Verifier creates verification request requiring selective disclosure; Wallet constructs a derived presentation meeting verifier requirements
Data:
- Verification request deeplink
- Wallet derived presentation (SD-JWT with selective disclosure)
- Verification endpoint
- Issuer DID
- Verifier presentation definition
Expected Result: Wallet presentation with selective disclosure accepted; credential successfully verified
